_secondarySources: Emirates Group L&D - Dubai Airport Overview (topology)
_meta._notes: Topology and APM transit timings now sourced from authoritative internal docs. Walking edge times within concourses still need measurement.

graphRules.edge: Edges may carry rideTimeSeconds + expectedWaitSeconds (for train) OR timeSeconds (for walk).

edgeKind.train: APM. Compute total = expectedWait + dwell + ride + dwell.
edgeKind.elevator: Vertical only (Concourse A/B atrium 'Sky Trains' high-capacity lifts)

apmOperationalNotes.system: Automated People Mover (APM) - driverless, situated below aircraft taxi way
apmOperationalNotes.lines: Two segregated lines: arrivals line and departures line

frequency.offPeak: 1 train per line in 'on-demand shuttle mode'

nodes.label: APM Station - T3/Concourse B side
nodes._notes: Stations connect to two major public levels of T3 per FAQ

edges._notes: T3 main integrated with Concourse B. MEASURE on next layover.

edges._notes: Total transit estimate: peak ~4 min (wait 60 + dwell 30 + ride 120 + dwell 30), off-peak ~6 min.
